products.bookDescription:
Is your loved one struggling with coloring books that feel too detailed, confusing, or overwhelming?
Many traditional adult coloring books can cause frustration instead of relaxation for seniors living with dementia or Alzheimer’s.
Easy Everyday Life Coloring Book was created to offer a calm, reassuring, and confidence-boosting activity through simple, familiar everyday objects and daily routines, designed specifically for seniors, elderly adults, and memory care settings.
Each page features one familiar object or gentle daily activity, drawn with bold, clear lines and plenty of open space, making coloring easier and more enjoyable.
What Makes This Dementia Coloring Book Different?
Familiar Everyday Life Designs: Simple objects and activities inspired by daily life help spark recognition and reduce confusion.
Familiar Everyday Life Designs: Simple objects and activities inspired by daily life help spark recognition and reduce confusion.
Large Print 8.5 × 11 Format: Spacious pages with bold outlines are easier for aging eyes and hands.
Large Print 8.5 × 11 Format: Spacious pages with bold outlines are easier for aging eyes and hands.
Simple, Bold Artwork: Extra thick lines, clean shapes, and large open spaces support stress free coloring.
Simple, Bold Artwork: Extra thick lines, clean shapes, and large open spaces support stress free coloring.
Designed for Dementia & Memory Care: One subject per page, no complex scenes, no text, and no unnecessary details.
Designed for Dementia & Memory Care: One subject per page, no complex scenes, no text, and no unnecessary details.
A Calming, Meaningful Activity: Ideal for independent use, caregiver-guided sessions, or group activities in memory care facilities.
A Calming, Meaningful Activity: Ideal for independent use, caregiver-guided sessions, or group activities in memory care facilities.
Perfect For:
Seniors and elderly adults with dementia or Alzheimer’s
Seniors and elderly adults with dementia or Alzheimer’s
Memory care and assisted living facilities
Memory care and assisted living facilities
Caregivers, family members, and occupational therapy activities
Caregivers, family members, and occupational therapy activities
Anyone seeking a gentle, frustration-free coloring experience
Anyone seeking a gentle, frustration-free coloring experience
This book isn’t about artistic perfection.It’s about comfort, recognition, and moments of calm success, one page at a time.
Give your loved one a simple, familiar activity they can enjoy with confidence, today and every day.

    The Simple Art: Coloring Book for Adults and Teens is a wonderfully calming addition to the world of all minimalist coloring books. It's true to its subtitle, the designs are bold, clean, and refreshingly simple—making it SO perfect for anyone looking to unwind without feeling overwhelmed by overly intricate patterns.One of the standout features of this book is its thoughtfully designed artwork. The bold lines clearly define each space, which not only makes coloring easier but also helps prevent color bleed confusion. This is especially helpful for beginners, teens, seniors, or anyone who prefers a more relaxed and stress-free creative experience. The minimalist style allows you to focus on color choices and shading rather than getting lost in tiny details.The pages strike a great balance: interesting enough to keep you engaged, yet simple enough to complete in a short sitting. That sense of accomplishment—finishing a page without hours of intense focus—adds to the overall therapeutic effect. It’s ideal for winding down after a long day, practicing mindfulness, or simply taking a break from screens.Another advantage is its versatility. Whether you enjoy colored pencils, markers, or gel pens, the bold and spacious designs adapt beautifully to different coloring tools and techniques.Overall, Simple Art: Coloring Book for Adults and Teens delivers exactly what it promises: easy, bold, and relaxing designs that make creativity accessible to everyone. If you’re searching for a stress-relieving coloring book that feels approachable and satisfying rather than complex and demanding, this is an excellent choice.

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Ich habe sehr viele verschiedene Malbücher und auch etliche von Jade Summer, mit denen ich bis heute zufrieden bin. Wie immer, sind wir auch von diesem hier für 7,99 € begeistert. Gekauft habe ich es im Sommer 2024 für meine 9-jährige Nichte, die oft in den Ferien vorbeikommt und seit dem 2. Lebensjahr sehr gerne malt. Sie konnte sich kaum entscheiden, da es so viele schöne und unterschiedliche, abwechslungsreiche Motive für jeden Geschmack und jede Stimmung in dem Buch gibt! Motive sind praktisch für das ganze Jahr zu finden: von Ostern, Frühling, Sommer, Halloween, Geburtstagsgeschenk, Blumen in verschiedensten Varianten bis hin zu Glaswelten und Natur, ...Es ist weißes !!! Papier, was bei Amazon heute oft nicht mehr die Normalität ist. Wir legen beim Malen immer ein dickes Stück Pappe unter die auszumalende Seite, damit nichts durchdrückt. Das funktioniert wunderbar. Die Flächen sind ausreichend groß, dass man auch eigene Kreativität einbringen kann, wenn man das möchte. Es ist, war ein rundum gelungenes Geschenk für meine Nichte. Ich selbst konnte nicht anders und habe mich an der Schildkröte versucht. Die Bilder sind angefügt, um eine Vorstellung von den vielen verschiedenen Themen zu bekommen. Allerdings hat sich der Preis doch sehr ins Negative, sprich um 4 € nach oben, verändert!

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: The Perfect Relaxation Break in a Book
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I picked up Large Print Easy Color & Frame – Calm hoping for a simple way to unwind, and it’s been exactly that. The pages are large and easy to color, which makes it super relaxing without feeling frustrating or stressful. I love that the designs are gentle and soothing—nothing too complicated—so I can just focus on the colors and take a real break from my day. The paper quality is nice too; markers, pencils, or crayons all work without bleeding through.After spending some time with this coloring book, I’ve found it’s become my go-to stress relief. Coloring a page feels almost meditative, and I actually notice my mood lift a little each time I sit down with it. The framed designs make it feel satisfying to finish a page, and I like that I can display my favorites if I want. It’s simple, calming, and exactly what I need when I just want a few quiet minutes for myself. I’ll definitely be keeping this one handy for whenever I need a mindful moment.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Great, easy alternative to screen time
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This large print coloring book has become one of my favorite unexpected joys. While I bought it for the relaxing, no-pressure coloring experience (and it definitely delivers on that front), I’ve actually found a second, more creative use for it: as the backdrop for the letters I send to my pen pals.The bold, whimsical designs make each letter feel a little more special—and the large print makes it easy to color without eye strain or perfection pressure. Whether I leave the page black and white or partially colored, it adds a personal, artistic touch to my correspondence.Highly recommend if you’re looking for a gentle creative outlet or a fun way to make your snail mail stand out!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on July 10, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I’m not sure who put this ugly Amazon sticker on the front of the coloring book but I hope you step on a Lego lol.You can’t even take it off either! It just has a black void sticker that’s super thin and un-peelable underneath. So now I’m stuck with this ugly cover, it doesn’t seem like a big deal (cause it’s not) but like, it annoys me, and since I have my coloring books on my desk and have to look at this sticker all day (sueeee me)- this seems like something on Amazons end so I’m not blaming the company.The coloring book in general is exactly what I needed. As someone who takes calls at home all day for work, I wanted something mindless to fidget with. This is perfect, simple designs, bold outlines. I don’t look at it and immediately get overwhelmed. It’s a perfectly calming and mindless coloring experience. I also LOVE the spiral format. I don’t understand why more companies don’t do this? It’s a much better experience in my opinion. Would recommend for sure! Just maybe expect a stupid Amazon sticker on the front lol.
